hooks.command: jq -r 'def changed_path: (.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.new_path // ""); if (changed_path | test("/mnt/rhhd/projects/provodnik/provodnik.app/(src|supabase|public)/")) and (changed_path | test("\\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|sql)$")) then {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": ("[CODEBASE.md] " + changed_path + " was modified. Update the relevant section(s) in /mnt/rhhd/projects/provodnik/CODEBASE.md to reflect this change before finishing.")}} else {} end'
